pi_items.source: Verified against verifier.py logic explicitly checking > 10000 triangles.
Verified by downloading the real CT Cranium DICOM dataset from the official InVesalius v3.0 GitHub release and inspecting the extracted directory structure via setup_invesalius.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real CT Cranium DICOM data (series 0051) downloaded from the official InVesalius v3.0 GitHub releases. The verifier explicitly checks for the creation of raw_skull.stl and closed_skull.stl in /home/ga/Documents, and strictly requires both models to contain >10000 triangles and that the closed STL has a strictly larger calculated volume than the raw STL.
